summary: Both REQ-1 (Partners section) and REQ-2 (sidebar navigation) are implemented. The Partners component displays Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid with responsive styling. The AppSidebar includes all five required navigation items (Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, Sharks Vote) plus an extra 'Shop' link. The MenuButton is persistently rendered across all pages.

hallucinated_features.description: An extra 'Shop' navigation item is included in the sidebar
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies exactly five sidebar navigation items: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, Sharks Vote. The diff adds a sixth item 'Shop' (linking to the store page) that was not requested.
